positive_traits.name: Worldly
positive_traits.description: Has traveled broadly; reduces price penalties at foreign ports by 10%.
positive_traits.description_es: Ha viajado ampliamente; reduce las penalizaciones de precio en puertos extranjeros en un 10%.

positive_traits.name: Polyglot
positive_traits.description: Picks up languages quickly; functions as partial translator even in unknown tongues.
positive_traits.description_es: Aprende lenguas con rapidez; actúa como traductor parcial incluso en idiomas desconocidos.

positive_traits.name: Skilled Navigator
positive_traits.description: Reduces travel time between ports by 1 day.
positive_traits.description_es: Reduce el tiempo de viaje entre puertos en 1 día.

positive_traits.name: Iron Constitution
positive_traits.description: Rarely falls ill; reduces crew sickness events.
positive_traits.description_es: Rara vez enferma; reduce los eventos de enfermedad entre la tripulación.

positive_traits.name: Veteran Sailor
positive_traits.description: Adds +5 to ship handling in storms.
positive_traits.description_es: Añade +5 al manejo del navío en tormentas.

positive_traits.name: Inspiring
positive_traits.description: Passively adds +2 morale per day at sea.
positive_traits.description_es: Añade pasivamente +2 de moral por día en alta mar.

positive_traits.name: Sharp Eye
positive_traits.description: Spots threats early; reduces chance of being surprised at sea by 20%.
positive_traits.description_es: Detecta amenazas a tiempo; reduce en un 20% la probabilidad de ser sorprendido en el mar.

positive_traits.name: Strong
positive_traits.description: +3 combat effectiveness in boarding actions.
positive_traits.description_es: +3 de efectividad en combate durante abordajes.

positive_traits.name: Quick
positive_traits.description: +2 combat effectiveness, first strike advantage.
positive_traits.description_es: +2 de efectividad en combate, ventaja de ataque primero.

positive_traits.name: Intimidating
positive_traits.description: Reduces pirate boarding attempts by 10%.
positive_traits.description_es: Reduce los intentos de abordaje piratas en un 10%.

positive_traits.name: Pious
positive_traits.description: Boosts morale among crew of matching religion by 5.
positive_traits.description_es: Aumenta la moral de la tripulación de la misma fe en 5.

positive_traits.name: Healer
positive_traits.description: Reduces crew casualties from combat and disease.
positive_traits.description_es: Reduce las bajas de la tripulación por combate y enfermedad.

positive_traits.name: Sharp Trader
positive_traits.description: Gets an additional 5% on all sell prices.
positive_traits.description_es: Obtiene un 5% adicional en todos los precios de venta.

positive_traits.name: Calm Under Fire
positive_traits.description: Prevents morale drop during combat.
positive_traits.description_es: Impide la caída de moral durante el combate.

positive_traits.name: Storyteller
positive_traits.description: Boosts morale at port; reduces time needed to recruit.
positive_traits.description_es: Eleva la moral en puerto; reduce el tiempo necesario para reclutar.

positive_traits.name: Brave
positive_traits.description: Holds the line under fire; +3 combat effectiveness, prevents morale drop for adjacent crew during combat.
positive_traits.description_es: No cede bajo el fuego; +3 de efectividad en combate, evita la caída de moral de los tripulantes cercanos durante el combate.

positive_traits.name: Generous
positive_traits.description: Shares earnings and keeps spirits high; +3 morale per port call among crew who witness it.
positive_traits.description_es: Comparte ganancias y mantiene el ánimo; +3 de moral por escala entre la tripulación que lo observa.

positive_traits.name: Strong Swimmer
positive_traits.description: Raised in a sea-nomad or amphibious fishing culture; swims capably in open water. Improves survival odds in shipwrecks and man-overboard incidents.
positive_traits.description_es: Criado en una cultura nómada del mar o de pesca anfibia; nada con soltura en mar abierto. Mejora las probabilidades de supervivencia en naufragios e incidentes de hombre al agua.

positive_traits.name: Fisher-folk (Coastal)
positive_traits.description: Grew up fishing inshore waters and reefs; supplements the ship's provisions when sailing near land.
positive_traits.description_es: Creció pescando en aguas costeras y arrecifes; complementa las provisiones del barco cuando se navega cerca de tierra.

positive_traits.name: Fisher-folk (Open-Ocean)
positive_traits.description: A rarer skill — trolling and deep-water fishing far from shore. Supplements provisions even on the open sea, where coastal fishing knowledge fails.
positive_traits.description_es: Una habilidad más rara — pesca de curricán y de aguas profundas lejos de la costa. Complementa las provisiones incluso en alta mar, donde el conocimiento de pesca costera no sirve.

negative_traits.name: Drunkard
negative_traits.description: At port, has a 20% chance to cause a brawl, costing gold.
negative_traits.description_es: En puerto, tiene un 20% de posibilidades de provocar una pelea, costando oro.

negative_traits.name: Coward
negative_traits.description: Flees during combat; reduces combat effectiveness of adjacent crew.
negative_traits.description_es: Huye durante el combate; reduce la efectividad de los tripulantes cercanos.

negative_traits.name: Greedy
negative_traits.description: Demands double wages or morale drops.
negative_traits.description_es: Exige el doble de salario o la moral cae.

negative_traits.name: Superstitious
negative_traits.description: Loses 3 morale when unusual events occur at sea.
negative_traits.description_es: Pierde 3 de moral cuando ocurren eventos inusuales en el mar.

negative_traits.name: Chronically Seasick
negative_traits.description: Loses effectiveness at sea; -2 morale per 2 days.
negative_traits.description_es: Pierde efectividad en alta mar; -2 de moral cada 2 días.

negative_traits.name: Violent Temper
negative_traits.description: 10% chance per port of starting a fight.
negative_traits.description_es: 10% de posibilidades por puerto de provocar una pelea.

negative_traits.name: Slow-Witted
negative_traits.description: Fumbles under pressure; -2 in emergencies.
negative_traits.description_es: Se desconcierta bajo presión; -2 en emergencias.

negative_traits.name: Gossip
negative_traits.description: Spreads rumors; -5 diplomacy with port rulers.
negative_traits.description_es: Difunde rumores; -5 de diplomacia con los gobernantes del puerto.

negative_traits.name: Kleptomaniac
negative_traits.description: Has a 10% chance to steal small amounts from cargo each port.
negative_traits.description_es: Tiene un 10% de posibilidades de robar pequeñas cantidades de la carga en cada puerto.

negative_traits.name: Sickly
negative_traits.description: Prone to illness; risks spreading disease to crew.
negative_traits.description_es: Propenso a enfermar; arriesga propagar enfermedades a la tripulación.

negative_traits.name: Insubordinate
negative_traits.description: Refuses orders 15% of the time; causes crew friction.
negative_traits.description_es: Rechaza órdenes el 15% de las veces; genera fricciones en la tripulación.

negative_traits.name: Unlucky
negative_traits.description: Increases bad sea event probability by 10%.
negative_traits.description_es: Aumenta la probabilidad de eventos adversos en el mar en un 10%.

negative_traits.name: Bigoted
negative_traits.description: Reduces morale among crew of different religion/ethnicity by 3.
negative_traits.description_es: Reduce la moral de la tripulación de distinta fe o etnia en 3.

negative_traits.name: Compulsive Gambler
negative_traits.description: Loses gold at port dice games; 15% chance to drain party funds.
negative_traits.description_es: Pierde oro en los juegos de dados del puerto; 15% de posibilidades de agotar los fondos.

negative_traits.name: Crude
negative_traits.description: Offends local dignitaries; -10 to ruler disposition on first meeting.
negative_traits.description_es: Ofende a los dignatarios locales; -10 a la disposición del gobernante en el primer encuentro.

negative_traits.name: Zealot
negative_traits.description: Fanatical faith. Boosts same-faith morale +5 but creates friction with those of opposing belief. Conflict events possible.
negative_traits.description_es: Fe intransigente. Eleva la moral de quienes comparten su credo en +5, pero genera conflictos con los de creencias opuestas. Posibles eventos de confrontación.

negative_traits.name: Prideful
negative_traits.description: Will not take orders from those he deems beneath him. Cannot be insubordinate — pride runs deeper than defiance.
negative_traits.description_es: No acepta órdenes de quienes considera inferiores. No es insubordinación — el orgullo corre más hondo que la rebeldía.

negative_traits.name: Oath-Breaker
negative_traits.description: Known to have broken a sworn oath. Other crew trust him less. Some ports know his name.
negative_traits.description_es: Conocido por haber traicionado un juramento. La tripulación confía menos en él. Algunos puertos conocen su nombre.

negative_traits.name: Haunted
negative_traits.description: Carries an old wound — a loss or a crime that never leaves. Periodic morale dips. Certain events hit harder.
negative_traits.description_es: Carga con una herida antigua — una pérdida o un crimen que no lo abandona. Caídas periódicas de moral. Ciertos eventos lo golpean con más fuerza.

negative_traits.name: Miserly
negative_traits.description: Hoards wages and refuses to share; crew resents him. -3 morale per port call among those who notice.
negative_traits.description_es: Acumula salario y se niega a compartir; la tripulación lo resiente. -3 de moral por escala entre quienes lo notan.

negative_traits.name: Womanizer
negative_traits.description: Trouble at every port; pursues local women without regard for rank or consequence. Risk of scandal involving a merchant's wife or harbor official's daughter.
negative_traits.description_es: Problemas en cada puerto; persigue a mujeres locales sin importar el rango ni las consecuencias. Riesgo de escándalo con la esposa de un mercader o la hija de un oficial portuario.

negative_traits.name: Xenophobic
negative_traits.description: Distrusts foreign ports and peoples. Morale penalty at non-home-region ports. Creates crew tension with worldly or polyglot members.
negative_traits.description_es: Desconfía de los puertos y pueblos extranjeros. Penalización de moral en puertos fuera de su región. Genera tensión con los miembros cosmopolitas o políglotas de la tripulación.

occupations.name: Sailor
occupations.description: The backbone of any crew. Does a bit of everything.
occupations.description_es: El pilar de toda tripulación. Hace un poco de todo.

occupations.name: Navigator
occupations.description: Reads stars, currents, and coastlines. Reduces travel time.
occupations.description_es: Lee estrellas, corrientes y costas. Reduce el tiempo de viaje.

occupations.name: Merchant
occupations.description: Knows the value of things. Better prices when trading.
occupations.description_es: Conoce el valor de las cosas. Mejores precios al comerciar.

occupations.name: Soldier
occupations.description: Trained for combat. Crucial in boarding actions and pirate encounters.
occupations.description_es: Entrenado para el combate. Esencial en abordajes y encuentros con piratas.

occupations.name: Gunner
occupations.description: Manages ship artillery. Improves cannon effectiveness.
occupations.description_es: Maneja la artillería del barco. Mejora la efectividad de los cañones.

occupations.name: Physician
occupations.description: Reduces crew casualties from disease and combat wounds.
occupations.description_es: Reduce las bajas de la tripulación por enfermedad y heridas de combate.

occupations.name: Interpreter
occupations.description: Fluent in multiple tongues. Unlocks better prices and diplomatic options.
occupations.description_es: Fluido en múltiples lenguas. Desbloquea mejores precios y opciones diplomáticas.

occupations.name: Ship's Carpenter
occupations.description: Repairs hull damage. Invaluable after storms or battles.
occupations.description_es: Repara los daños del casco. Invaluable tras tormentas o batallas.

occupations.name: Priest/Imam/Monk
occupations.description: Religious figure aboard. Boosts morale among faithful crew.
occupations.description_es: Figura religiosa a bordo. Eleva la moral de la tripulación devota.

occupations.name: Ship's Cook
occupations.description: Good food keeps a crew alive. Reduces morale loss on long voyages.
occupations.description_es: La buena comida mantiene viva a la tripulación. Reduce la pérdida de moral en travesías largas.

occupations.name: Pearl Diver
occupations.description: Skilled underwater. Unlocks unique salvage options at sea.
occupations.description_es: Hábil bajo el agua. Desbloquea opciones únicas de salvamento en el mar.

occupations.name: Scout
occupations.description: Eyes and ears. Reduces chance of ambush and reveals port rumors.
occupations.description_es: Ojos y oídos. Reduce la probabilidad de emboscadas y revela rumores del puerto.

occupations.name: Mercenary
occupations.description: Fights for gold. High combat, demands premium pay.
occupations.description_es: Combate por oro. Alto nivel de combate, exige paga premium.

occupations.name: Former Pirate
occupations.description: Knows pirate tactics from the inside. Mixed blessing.
occupations.description_es: Conoce las tácticas piratas desde dentro. Bendición con condiciones.

occupations.name: Herbalist
occupations.description: Knowledge of local plants. Reduces disease risk; can trade remedies.
occupations.description_es: Conocimiento de plantas locales. Reduce el riesgo de enfermedad; puede comerciar remedios.

kris.name: Kris (Keris)
kris.description: Wavy-bladed dagger of great ritual significance. Fast and deadly at close quarters.
kris.description_es: Daga de hoja ondulada y gran significado ritual. Rápida y letal en el combate cuerpo a cuerpo.

parang.name: Parang
parang.description: Heavy chopping blade. Common among Malay sailors and soldiers.
parang.description_es: Hoja pesada para cortar. Común entre marineros y soldados malayos.

urumi.name: Urumi
urumi.description: Flexible whip-sword from the Malabar Coast. Lethal in practiced hands.
urumi.description_es: Espada-látigo flexible de la Costa de Malabar. Letal en manos expertas.

katar.name: Katar
katar.description: Push-dagger with transverse grip. Punches through chain.
katar.description_es: Daga de empuje con empuñadura transversal. Perfora la cota de malla.

scimitar.name: Scimitar
scimitar.description: Curved cavalry blade, used widely around the Persian Gulf and Indian Ocean.
scimitar.description_es: Hoja curva de caballería, usada ampliamente en el Golfo Pérsico y el Océano Índico.

composite_bow.name: Composite Bow
composite_bow.description: Powerful recurve bow. High draw weight, fearsome range.
composite_bow.description_es: Potente arco recurvo. Gran tensión, alcance formidable.

dao.name: Dao (Chinese Saber)
dao.description: Single-edged Chinese blade. Standard weapon of Ming soldiers and sailors.
dao.description_es: Hoja china de un solo filo. Arma estándar de soldados y marineros Ming.

fire_lance.name: Fire Lance
fire_lance.description: Precursor to the gun: a bamboo tube packed with gunpowder. Terrifying, unstable.
fire_lance.description_es: Precursor del arma de fuego: un tubo de bambú cargado con pólvora. Aterrador e inestable.

sword_rapier.name: Rapier
sword_rapier.description: Thrusting sword of European infantry officers. Fast and precise.
sword_rapier.description_es: Espada de estocada de los oficiales de infantería europeos. Rápida y precisa.

pike.name: Pike
pike.description: Long spear used in European pike formations. Effective against cavalry and boarding parties.
pike.description_es: Lanza larga usada en formaciones de piqueros europeos. Efectiva contra caballería y abordajes.

arquebus.name: Arquebus
arquebus.description: Matchlock firearm. Slow to reload but devastating at range.
arquebus.description_es: Arma de fuego de mecha. Lenta en recargar, pero devastadora a distancia.

local_arquebus.name: Local Arquebus (Bedil)
local_arquebus.description: A crude matchlock copy, locally forged by artisans of variable skill. Cheaper but prone to misfires.
local_arquebus.description_es: Una tosca copia de arcabuz, forjada localmente por artesanos de habilidad variable. Más barata, pero propensa a fallar.

crossbow.name: Crossbow
crossbow.description: Mechanical bow. Slower than a longbow but requires less training.
crossbow.description_es: Arco mecánico. Más lenta que el arco largo, pero requiere menos adiestramiento.

spear.name: Spear
spear.description: The universal weapon. Found everywhere from the Malabar Coast to the Spice Islands.
spear.description_es: El arma universal. Presente en todas partes, desde la Costa de Malabar hasta las Islas de las Especias.

dagger.name: Dagger
dagger.description: Short blade for close work. Easily concealed.
dagger.description_es: Hoja corta para el combate a distancia corta. Fácil de ocultar.

bow.name: Bow
bow.description: Simple hunting bow. Effective enough at short range.
bow.description_es: Arco de caza sencillo. Suficientemente efectivo a corta distancia.

blowpipe.name: Blowpipe (Sumpitan)
blowpipe.description: Silent, with poison darts. Unnerving at range. Poisoned darts optional.
blowpipe.description_es: Silenciosa, con dardos envenenados. Inquietante a distancia. Dardos envenenados opcionales.

keris_panjang.name: Keris Panjang (Long Kris)
keris_panjang.description: An elongated kris. More like a short sword. Reserved for warriors of standing.
keris_panjang.description_es: Un kris alargado. Más parecido a una espada corta. Reservado para guerreros de rango.

lance.name: Lance
lance.description: Cavalry weapon, effective in open land engagements. Cumbersome on a ship.
lance.description_es: Arma de caballería, efectiva en combates terrestres abiertos. Incómoda en un barco.
